API.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An unexpected Slash server error occurred. Please try again later.

USER.EMAIL_EXISTS: This email is already linked to an account.

USER.CERTIFIED_NAME_VALIDATE_QUESTION: Do you still wish to validate your choice?
USER.SLSH_ID_GENERATION_FAILED: An error occurred while generating your SLSH ID. Please try again.
USER.ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED: Your account has been temporarily suspended.

VALIDATION.USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username must be at least 2 characters long.
VALIDATION.USERNAME_LETTERS_ONLY: Username can only contain letters (no numbers, spaces, or special characters).
VALIDATION.DIGIT_INVALID: You must choose exactly one digit (0-9).
VALIDATION.LETTER_INVALID: You must choose exactly one letter (A-Z).
VALIDATION.PHONE_INVALID: Invalid phone number format. Please use international format (e.g., +33123456789).
VALIDATION.COUNTRY_CODE_INVALID: Country code must be exactly 2 characters long.
VALIDATION.DOB_IN_FUTURE: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
